EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IDEBaseNetwork

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply base network data element information.

[Guid("7CA3483D-1E24-48F3-8B01-B5174B75D3F1")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IDEBaseNetwork

Properties

AssociationSource

Returns the association source in this base network.

INetworkSource AssociationSource { get; }

Property Value

INetworkSource

Sample Snippet

Returns the associations table name for the network.

string AssociationsTableName { get; }

string
